passive.name: Organic Deconstruction
passive.description: Vel'Koz's abilities apply Organic Deconstruction to enemies on hit. If 3 stacks are accumulated, the enemy will take a burst of true damage.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Vel'Koz}} abilities apply a stack of ''Deconstruction'' to enemies hit for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The third stack consumes them all to deal {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Vel'Koz's''' [[Champion ability|abilities]] apply a [[stack]] of ''Deconstruction'' to enemies hit for 7 seconds, refreshing on [[basic attack]]s and subsequent applications and stacking up to 3 times.
wiki_detail.description2: The third stack consumes them all to deal {{sti|true damage|{{as|{{pp|35 to 180}}|true damage}}}} {{as|(+ 60% AP)}} {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}}.

Q.name: Plasma Fission
Q.description: Vel'Koz shoots a bolt of plasma that splits in two on reactivation or upon hitting an enemy. The bolt slows and damages on hit.
Q.tooltip:
Vel'Koz shoots a plasma bolt that deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage and Slows by {{ slowamount*100 }}% decaying over {{ slowduration }} second(s). At the end of its range, on hitting a target, or on Recasting, the bolt splits and fires two new bolts at a 90 degree angle.

Killing a unit with this restores {{ tooltipmanarefund }} Mana.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vel'Koz}} fires a plasma bolt that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit, {{tip|slow|slowing}} them for a short time.
''Plasma Fission'' can be recast while the bolt is in flight, and does so automatically upon hitting an enemy or max range.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} The bolt splits in two, each firing in perpendicular opposite directions.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Whenever ''Plasma Fission'' kills an enemy, '''Vel'Koz''' restores {{sti|mana|{{as|mana}}}}.
wiki_detail.description:
{{sbc|Active:}} '''Vel'Koz''' fires a plasma bolt in the target direction that deals {{as|magic damage}} to the first enemy hit and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 70% decaying over a duration.

''Plasma Fission'' can be recast after {{fd|0.25}} seconds while the bolt is in flight, and does so automatically upon hitting an enemy or maximum range.
wiki_detail.leveling:
{{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|80 to 240}} {{as|(+ 90% AP)}}}}
{{st|Slow Duration|{{ap|1 to 2.6}} seconds}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Vel'Koz''' splits the bolt in two {{tt|over {{fd|0.25}} seconds|Estimated}}, each part firing perpendicularly in opposite directions and applying the same effects to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description3: Whenever ''Plasma Fission'' kills an enemy, '''Vel'Koz''' restores {{sti|mana|{{as|mana}}}}.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Mana Restored per Kill|{{as|{{ap|20 to 30}}|mana}}|Maximum Mana Restored|{{as|{{ap|20*3 to 30*3}}|mana}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* The initial cast counts as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
** Detonating the ability manually does not.
* An enemy cannot be hit by multiple bolts even when having blocked one with a {{tip|spell shield}}.
* The split occurs at a location 55 units in front of the primary bolt's final location.
* ''Plasma Fission'' can reach a maximum 1595 units diagonally (ignoring the split missile's width and enemy hitbox radius), reaching this distance after a total of about ~{{fd|1.65}} seconds.
{{Effect at cast time end}}

W.name: Void Rift
W.description: Vel'Koz opens a rift to the void that deals an initial burst of damage, then explodes for a second burst of damage after a delay.
W.tooltip:
Vel'Koz opens a rift to the void, dealing {{ initialdamage }} magic damage. The rift then erupts, dealing {{ secondarydamage }} magic damage.

This Ability has 2 charges ({{ ammorechargetime }} second refresh).{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vel'Koz}} cracks a rift in the target direction that opens after a brief delay, cascading through the area to deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb2: After a brief delay, the rift collapses, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.blurb3: '''Vel'Koz''' periodically stocks a charge of ''Void Rift'', up to a maximum of 2.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vel'Koz''' cracks a rift in the target direction that opens after a {{fd|0.25}}-second delay, cascading through the area over {{fd|0.65}} seconds to deal {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within.
wiki_detail.description2: After {{tt|{{fd|0.75}} seconds|Estimated}}, the rift violently collapses, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies within and granting {{tip|sight}} of the surrounding area for {{fd|0.25}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Magic Damage|{{ap|45 to 165}} {{as|(+ 25% AP)}}|Total Magic Damage|{{ap|30+45 to 110+165}} {{as|(+ 45% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: '''Vel'Koz''' periodically [[stock]]s a ''Void Rift'' charge, up to a maximum of 2.
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|1105|Ripple missile range}} / {{tip|er|icononly = true}} {{tt|1105|Rift collapse distance}} / {{tt|-95|Rift collapsing backwards distance}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}} and {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} will block the ripple and prevent the rift from forming further, but they will not destroy the section that was created already.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} only blocks one instance of damage.

E.name: Tectonic Disruption
E.description: Vel'Koz causes an area to explode, knocking up enemies, and knocking close enemies slightly away.
E.tooltip: Vel'Koz disrupts a nearby area, causing it to explode, Knocking Up for {{ stunduration }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. Enemies close to Vel'Koz will be Knocked Back instead of Knocked Up.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vel'Koz}} hurls a disruptive anomaly at the target location that deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit, briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} and {{tip|stuns}} them.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Vel'Koz''' hurls a disruptive anomaly that lands to the target location after {{pp|0.25;0.25 to 0.55|0;150 to 800 by 50|type=cast distance|formula=0.25 until 150 cast distance; 0.25 + 0.3 * (cast distance - 150) / 650 until maximum cast distance}} seconds, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit and {{tip|airborne|knocking them up}} and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, as well as granting {{tip|sight}} of the area briefly.
wiki_detail.description2: If ''Tectonic Disruption'' is cast in close proximity of '''Vel'Koz''', the anomaly will also slightly {{tip|airborne|knock back}} enemies hit in the direction of the cast.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The required proximity for the {{tip|airborne|knock back}} is relative to '''Vel'Koz's''' position when casting and not his current one.
* While the effect is fully prevented by blocking the missile (e.g. with {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}} and {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}}), the missile may not be destroyed ''visually''.{{bug}}
* The area of effect indicator appears at the end of the cast time.
** It will persist even if the cast cancels (e.g. '''Vel'Koz''' dies before cast time completes) despite the projectile not firing.
* {{tip|Displacement immunity}} will also resist the application of the {{tip|stun}}.

R.name: Life Form Disintegration Ray
R.description: Vel'Koz unleashes a channelled beam that follows the cursor for 2.5 seconds that deals magic damage. Organic Deconstruction Researches enemy champions causing them to take true damage instead.
R.tooltip:
Vel'Koz channels a ray of energy that follows the cursor, dealing a total of {{ totaldamage }} magic damage over 2.5 seconds and Slowing by {{ e3 }}%. Deals true damage instead to enemies recently damaged by Organic Deconstruction.

Enemies gain stacks of Deconstruction periodically while in the beam.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive - Researched:}} Applying 3 {{ai|Organic Deconstruction|Vel'Koz|''Deconstruction''}} stacks will mark the target ''Researched'' for a few seconds, which refreshes on basic attacks and ability hits.
wiki_detail.blurb2:
{{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Vel'Koz}} {{tip|channel|channels}} for a short time to project an energy beam that continually deals {{as|magic damage}}, applies ''{{ai|Organic Deconstruction|Vel'Koz|Deconstruction}}'', and briefly {{tip|slow|slows}} enemies hit. During this time, '''Vel'Koz''' can steer the beam in the target direction.
''Life Form Disintegration Ray'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{ai|Researched|Vel'Koz}} Bonus:}} The beam deals {{as|true damage}} instead.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive - Researched:}} Applying 3 {{ai|Organic Deconstruction|Vel'Koz|''Deconstruction''}} stacks to an enemy {{tip|champion}} marks them as ''Researched'' for 7 seconds, refreshing on basic attacks and ability hits against them.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} After a {{fd|0.2}}-second delay, '''Vel'Koz''' {{tip|channel|channels}} for up to {{fd|2.6}} seconds to project an energy beam, during which he can steer the beam in the target direction. ''Life Form Disintegration Ray'' can be recast after 1 second during the channel, and does so automatically after the duration.
wiki_detail.description3: The beam deals {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit every {{fd|0.2}} seconds, and {{tip|slow|slows}} them by 20%, lingering for 1 second. ''{{ai|Organic Deconstruction|Vel'Koz|Deconstruction}}'' is applied every {{fd|0.7}} seconds to enemies hit. {{ai|Researched|Vel'Koz|''Researched''}} enemies take {{as|true damage}} instead.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Damage Per Tick|{{ap|(450 to 800)*0.2/2.6|round=2}} {{as|(+ {{ap|125*0.2/2.6|round=2}}% AP)}}|Maximum Damage|{{ap|450 to 800}} {{as|(+ 125% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Life Form Disintegration Ray's'' direction updates gradually (moving the cursor from one side of '''Vel'Koz''' to the other will not make him rotate instantly).
* '''Vel'Koz''' will {{tip|sight|reveal}} himself if the ray is near an enemy champion.
* The beam hits in a rectangular shape, intersecting with the edge of an enemy {{tip|gameplay radius}}.
** Because of this, the effect will hit enemies whose center location is to the sides and/or slightly behind Vel'Koz, as long as their radius intersects with the area.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Vel'Koz''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|channel|attack=false|cast=false|move=false|items=interrupts,true,,false|spells=true, false, interrupts, interrupts, false}}
